Coder — rate limited, retrying...
Starting fix sprint — resolving the 409 Conflict bug on workflow re-save. Reading relevant files now.
Starting fix sprint — resolving the 409 Conflict bug on workflow re-save. Reading relevant files now.

Quick fix in progress...
"Fix React Flow rendering issues in the workflow editor. There are three problems:

1. GHOST WHITE RECTANGLE + BLACK BORDER: The `.react-flow__node` wrapper div has a white background by default and sh"

The fix has been sent to the Coder agent. Three specific changes:

1. **Ghost white rectangle** — The `.react-flow__node` wrapper div has a default white background that bleeds through behind the MUI Paper. New CSS sets it to transparent.
2. **Black border artifact** — React Flow adds an `outline` to selected/focused node wrappers. The CSS override removes it since MUI Paper already handles the selected state visually.
3. **Straight lines with dots** — Adding `defaultEdgeOptions` with `smoothstep` type and `MarkerType.ArrowClosed` markers will give you clean curved edges with arrowheads instead of raw endpoint dots.

Your color scheme stays intact — just the structural rendering gets cleaned up.
Fixing React Flow rendering issues — adding edge options, CSS overrides, and importing workflow.css.
Fixing React Flow rendering issues — adding edge options, CSS overrides, and importing workflow.css.
All three React Flow rendering fixes are done and verified in the browser — no errors.
All three React Flow rendering fixes are done and verified in the browser — no errors.
Agent — rate limited, retrying...

All three fixes are applied and verified:

**Changes made:**

1. **`client/src/workflow/workflow.css`** (new file) — CSS overrides that:
   - Remove the default white background and border on `.react-flow__node` 
   - Remove the selection outline/box-shadow on focused/selected nodes
   - Style connection handles (10px circles with white border)
   - Set edge path stroke width

2. **`client/src/workflow/WorkflowEditor.tsx`** — Three additions:
   - Imported `MarkerType` from `@xyflow/react`
   - Imported `./workflow.css`
   - Added `defaultEdgeOptions` (smoothstep type, slate-colored stroke with arrow markers) and `connectionLineStyle` props to `<ReactFlow>`

The app renders cleanly with no console errors. Node components (InputNode, AgentNode, etc.) were not touched.

**Validation complete:**

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| `npx tsc --noEmit` (server) | ✅ Pass — no errors |
| `npx tsc --noEmit` (client) | ✅ Pass — no errors |
| `npm run build` | ✅ Pass — both server and client build cleanly |
| `npm test` | ⏭️ Skipped — no test suite configured |

All changes are type-safe and build without errors.
